name: Sheelagh na Gig Bookshop
content: The bookstore itself is pretty cool, and I found some nice books there. What makes this place special though is the jar of ginger rhubarb jam that I picked up there. I have many questions about ginger rhubarb jam. Who came up with the idea? Why does it taste so good? Will I ever be able to find it again? Or will I have to learn to live the rest of my life with only lesser jams? Seriously, if they are still selling the ginger rhubarb jam there, I would recommend picking up a jar or five. Also the books are cool.
